twitter_thread: 41% of Nori's potential damage is wasted due to suboptimal Star Power choices.
Pairing Nori with Colt increases damage output by 22%, but with Bull it drops by 18%.
A 5% damage boost from Star Powers beats 3% extra health in 7 out of 10 matches.
Nori's win rate plummets 35% when paired with brawlers dealing <200 damage per second.
Colt and Leon are the top 2 brawlers to pair with Nori for maximum damage.
Do you prioritize damage or health when choosing Nori's Star Powers? #brawlstars #gaming
What's your most effective Nori setup in the current meta? #gamingstrategies
